pack_yaml:
pack:
  id: examples/hot-connection-pack
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Connection-only pack for upstream services.
connections:
  - name: primary
    kind: postgres
    url: env://HOT_PACK_POSTGRES_URL
    pool:
      max_size: 5
      min_idle: 1
      acquire_timeout_ms: 3000
      idle_timeout_ms: 30000
  - name: events
    kind: nats
    urls: env://HOT_PACK_NATS_URL
    client_name: vflow-hot-pack-example
workflows: []
